title: What we know on Day 26 of the US and Israel’s war with Iran | CNN
text:
Source: CNN

US President Donald Trump expressed optimism on Tuesday that a deal with Tehran is in sight, and said that Vice President JD Vance, Secretary of State Marco Rubio and others were leadingnegotiations.

The move comes as the Trump administration weighs its options, with sources telling CNN that about1,000 US soldiers with the Army’s 82nd Airborne Divisionare expected to deploy to the Middle East in the coming days.

Here’s what to know on Day 26.

See Full Web Article

links.text: 1,000 US soldiers with the Army’s 82nd Airborne Division
